title: Geepas Digital Bathroom Scales for Body Weight, 180 Kg Capacity | Weighing Scale Bath Scales, LED Display | Fitness Scale with Large Platform, Black
features: ✅ PRECISION WEIGHT MEASUREMENT: The main advantage of electronic scales is that it does not lose their accuracy with time. With a maximum capacity of 180 kg, this scale offers precise measurements in 100g increments, allowing you to track even the smallest changes in your weight accurately.
✅ DIGITAL LED DISPLAY - Immediate readings as soon as you step on the scale; Max weight capacity of 180kg. The large, easy-to-read LED display delivers clear results instantly.
✅ TEMPERED GLASS PLATFORM STRAINED GLASS, COMPACT DESIGN - Heavy-duty 6mm tempered glass structure, ABS base can withstand weight up to 180 kg. Large, easy to read LED display with compact design.
✅ ADVANTAGES: 2 Measuring units (kg /lb), LED display, auto-power-off, auto-zero, low battery and overload indication. With 3pcs x 1.5V AAA Batteries. (NOT INCLUDED)

✅ EASY TO USE - The bathroom scales come with many friendly features, including: 2 Measuring units (kg /lb), LED display, auto calibration, auto step-on, auto power off, low battery and overload indication. With 3pcs x 1.5V AAA Batteries. (NOT INCLUDED), and high precision in full weighing range.

✅ USER-FRIENDLY OPERATION: Designed for convenience, the scale features an auto-on/off function, making it easy to use without any complicated setup. Step on, get your reading, and step off – it's that simple.

✅ ANTI-SLIP DESIGN- Anti-slip silicone pads are fitted to each corner on the base of the scale for advanced user safety. These pads prevent the scales from moving, keeping you safe and stable when stepping on and off.
